title: MyGift Clear Glass Apothecary Jars with Lid, Decorative Footed Vase, Candy Buffet Containers Set of 3
description:
About this item
Set of 3 elegantly designed hand blown glass apothecary style jars with lids
Perfect for decorations such as flowers, fruits, sand and seashells, and other dry decorations, or for edible items such as dried pasta, grains, candy, biscuits, fruits, and more
Tastefully decorate any space in your home or business while adding stylish storage
Great as a housewarming or wedding present, or used at a buffet or wedding
Approximate Dimensions: Largest Jar- 13.8 H x 3.7 Diameter; Medium Jar - 12.8 H x 5.1 Diameter; Small Jar - 8.5 H x 4.3 Diameter (in inches)
reviews_5s:
Nice for decorative use, easy to fill with whatever you want. They don’t feel thick and cheap, but still seem durable. Easy to clean and the kids fit well. One of the better options out there, but they are a little pricey. That being said, I returned a cheaper set from another vendor because the quality was garbage and the lids didn’t even fit. So, I guess it’s the usual that you get what you pay forThese are perfect for my holiday homemade candied nuts and mints on a desert buffet. Since I always read the negative reviews first I was hesitant. Glad I took the leap because these are beautiful.

They are smaller than they look in the pictures but I did note the description sizes. Which in inches instead of CM is 14.5", 12.5" and 9".

These are not thin or poor quality as some have described. Hand blown glass will have some tiny bubbles ... mine had virtually none. The rim cuts were smooth with no chips. The thickness of the glass was close to 1/8" perhaps a little over that in the lower part of the jar and perhaps a little thinner in the lids.

I purchased another set which came with 2 and different shapes ... all together and side by side they make a gorgeous display. The 2 taller in this set have narrow openings ... only a child could get their hand in there I am afraid to get what they want out.

Other than that it would be to take the lid off and dump whatever is inside out.These were slightly smaller than I thought they would be (the tallest one is about the height of a wine bottle) but that isn't really a con for me because there will be a lot of kids at my wedding and I think the smaller size will be perfect. Great buy for the price and the jars are beautiful. My only real complaint is the standard size candy scoop doesn't fit very well. I'd suggest anyone looking to use these for a wedding look for smaller scoops. They'll also look great as decor in my house after the wedding, though I wouldn't store food in them as the lids fit loosely. I'm very pleased with this purchase and would buy again.These are PERFECT. Super cute designs and durable enough for use. Obviously they are glass, but there were no imperfections, they came packaged well for shipping ans have no inclusions.
I’m a major pink fan and I filled them with all different shades of pink candies. I read some comments saying they were too small to hold very much, but I’ve got about 1.5 pounds of jelly bellies in 2/3 of them and the other is filled about two pounds of chocolate. That’s PLENTY at one time.
They even passed my mother’s approval, and she’s an interior decorator and slightly picky. She even asked where she could get some.I used these to store a decorative selection of dice and game cubes for my game room. They were plenty heavy and looked great. Tops fit well (though don't expect a super-tight seal as the jars and lids are glass).These are being used for display on my kitchen counter and they look wonderful grouped together. You can use them separately in any room such as the bathroom for your cotton balls, qtips, bath salts, etc. sand and shells as a decoration, candy jars so many great uses.I used these for a work party! The beauty is that I get to keep them and use them over and over! These are excellent for any season, can hold candy, candles, lights, baby items, ext. so versatile and good quality. They are thin glass so they cannot take anything rough but thick enough to be useful. Overall they were perfect.I was looking for jars to put my bath products and display them at the same time. It makes it accessible when I want to use the product. I love taking a bath so having my bath salts nearby makes it much easier to use. I use the jars to put my Epsom salts, other bath salts and use the other one to store extra soap. I love the way it transformed my bathroom, it feels like I am at a spa.
When I received the jars, I had an accident and dropped one of the lids, it broke. I was impressed by Mygift customer service. Very prompt and I was helped by Max, who immediately sent me a replacementPut them in my bathroom and filled them with soap and bath salts, very pretty.This jars look like the picture. Personally, I thought that they would be a little bit bigger than they actually are, but I am not upset in the least. The glass is very thin which makes them look, and feel high quality. This is a pretty simple review because these vases arrived exactly as they appeared (which I very much appreciated). I put decorative rocks and air plants in these, and everyone who has seen them has asked where I got the vases. I used them as a coffee table decoration but you could really put anything in them. I added a picture to give you a frame of reference for size, which happened to be a small-average sized kitty (~10 lbs.).
reviews_1s:
I was so excited to get these for my daughter’s baby shower! However the packaging is subpar and 1 of jars was cracked !! This was a last minute party due to covid but i was really planning on using these to decorate my counter top ... now unfortunately they are just sitting there because they are flimsy. Don’t purchase this item !! BewareWas hoping to use these as candy jars for an upcoming party but once I received the box I was not satisfied at all. This set is so incredibly cheap, they’re much smaller than the picture makes it seem and one of them broke on me as soon as i removed it from the box. The glass is like paper thin! Disappointed.I like it but is very thin. I need this for a candy buffet just received what I order but one of the lid came broken and another with bubbles. Hopefully I can return it. I guess I'll be going into Michael's craft store to buy it.The glass is so cheaply made. It’s really thin and fragile. As soon as I opened the box, two out of the 3 glasses broke. Waste of money.Please don’t buy this product. Much smaller than advertised. An absolute waste of money- you cannot fit anything in these jars, they are about the size of my fist. Very disappointed for the price.I got so disappointed because I was looking forward to its arrival and when I opened the package, one of the lid was completely broken. It’s too much trouble to send back...Decided to buy these because of all the positive reviews, unfortunately two of the jars came with air bubbles. Normally I wouldn’t mind but they are so big that it hard to ignore them. I will definitely be returning these.Don’t waste your money. 2 of the jars arrived with imperfections. Little bubbles throughout the glasses. Now I have to ship them back for exchange. LONG TIME to receive my order in the first place!! They don’t feel so durable. Glass is thin too.Nice set but packaging isn’t enough to avoid chips.
One came damaged. Trying to contact seller still no response.
Very thin glass. Not what I expectedThese jars are poorly made and not worth even $10. The lids do not fit properly, are wobbly, fall over easily.
